paper_expected: HOODIE Algorithm 1 / Table 4 / Dueling-DDQN / LSTM / epsilon-greedy / N_copy
repo_current: Paper-faithful simulation production pipeline with explicit algorithm-fidelity repair run

rows.repo_current: DDQNTrainer._episode_rollout selects random legal actions when exploration is enabled.
rows.evidence: Training now uses epsilon-greedy exploration; algorithm-fidelity run sets schedule_unit='episode' and decays epsilon over 2500 episodes.

rows.paper_expected: Algorithm 1 lines 23-36 sample replay and apply Double DQN loss with MSE.
rows.repo_current: DDQNTrainer._train_batch samples replay, uses online argmax on next state, target net evaluation, and MSE loss.
rows.evidence: trainer.py:_train_batch implements the Double DQN target path and MSE loss.

rows.paper_expected: Dueling network with LSTM encoder and 3x1024 fully-connected body.
rows.repo_current: PaperHoodieDuelingNetwork uses LSTM(20, 1 layer) followed by 3x1024 body and value/advantage heads.

rows.paper_expected: Target network copied every N_copy episodes (OCR line 39 / Table 3).
rows.repo_current: Legacy config remains optimizer-step based, but the algorithm-fidelity run enables explicit episode-based target sync with paper-aligned approval.
rows.evidence: TargetUpdateContract now accepts an episode unit; algorithm-fidelity smoke sets it to episode-based sync at 2000 episodes.

rows.paper_expected: Epsilon decreases linearly to zero during the first N/2 episodes and stays at zero.
rows.repo_current: Algorithm-fidelity smoke uses episode-based epsilon decay from 1.0 to 0.0 over 2500 episodes.

rows.paper_expected: Distributed multi-agent HOODIE with one DRL agent per edge server.
rows.repo_current: Single shared trainer is reused across per-agent traces; the policy is shared rather than one model per agent.
rows.evidence: Current production pipeline trains one shared policy over trace-bank episodes; no separate model fleet is implemented here.

rows.paper_expected: Per-agent local state contains task size, queue load, deadlines and load forecasts.
rows.repo_current: deadline_queue_feasibility_v1 state profile provides slot, queue load, task size, processing density, deadlines, slack and action feasibility features.

rows.paper_expected: Reward Eq. 20: negative latency on success, -40 on drop, NaN on no-arrival.
rows.repo_current: Per-task delayed reward credit assignment and horizon-aware recovered reconciliation remain unchanged from the prior repair.
